full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #23 (2026-05-06)

PULSE
Health: 0.4905 (C). 905 wallets, 164 contributors. 44 memos today vs 135 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
53 reward payments, 362758 PFT distributed to 28 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (70000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 17,600 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (9,400 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,200 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (75,800 PFT, avg 9,475/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): r4RPpe...WghS (49 memos). 12 new wallet(s) this week. 31 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 81.0%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
